title: Image input support
description: Accept image paste into chat input (screenshots, diagrams). User pastes image → included as vision content in next message to model. Providers that support vision: Anthropic (Claude 3+), OpenAI (GPT-4o), Google (Gemini). Need: detect paste event in TUI, store image bytes, encode as base64 in message content, render thumbnail in chat history. Use existing blob storage in input composer.

logs.msg: File attachment via path implemented (src/tui/attachment.rs). Supports png/jpg/gif/webp up to 20MB, base64-encoded to ContentBlock::Image. Agent tracks supports_vision per model. Gap: clipboard paste (ctrl+v image) not implemented yet — TUI doesn't detect terminal paste of binary image data.
